The Erotic Mind-Control Story Archive

Titles · Authors · Categories · Readers’ Picks · FAQ · The Garden of MC · MC Forum

Recent Additions

04 July 2026

The next update will be the weekend of 18 July 2026.

Absolute Yes (3 new chapters)
by Hypnotic Teacher (mc mf ff md ds in)
A scientist researching a sexually-transmitted disease makes an unsettling discovery about its origins and effects.
Amor Ex Machina (1 new chapter)
by Corrupting Power (mc ff md fd)
Tim Caselli has just inherited a rogue AI that’s hellbent on playing matchmaker and understanding the human condition. Can he teach her right from wrong while still living to tell the tale?
Arcana Chi (1 new chapter)
by Chrystal Wynd (mc mf ff md fd ma gr bd ds ex ft hm la rb)
Arcana Chi is Spellthorn Academy’s sorority for troublemakers and chaos magnets. Welcome to the Hex & Havoc House.
Battling Amour (2 new chapters)
by myavail (mc md)
A naval battle armour tech finds a flaw in the newest field model. Conveniently, he maintains the armour for none other than the Selkies, the all-women platoon of special forces operatives renowned as much for their beauty as their warfighting success. Each mission and armour refit brings him closer to a reality he never believed possible.
Becoming Mommy’s Good Boy (new)
by dahypno (mc mf fd ft hm)
Paul Ludvig was on the top of his game, he was in control an alpha male among those in the office…and the incredibly hot Elena has just asked him over...how could it get better than that.
Bimbo Wishes (new)
by Menoetes (mc mf md gr)
Well-intentioned Jason uses a magical lamp and its horny bimbo genie to impress his bookish college crush, Jen, but he forgets the golden rule: be careful what you wish for.
Bully’s Not so Bad (1 new chapter)
by Badger (mc md ds ex)
Michael remembers his bully, being pretty bad, but when him and his wife take him into their home, he starts to see things a little differently.
Change Can Be Good (1 new chapter)
by GibblyWoo (mc mf md in)
Bobby tries out his new invention, a device that can warp reality.
A Cult By Accident (1 new chapter)
by Hokan (mc mf md)
After a car accident, Carlie and Cameron find themselves in a patriarchical cult.
Debutantes (1 new chapter)
by scifiscribbler (mc mf ff ma)
After leaving high school behind them, the opportunity to enter society’s upper ranks lurks in a finishing school. But what do they need to learn before they make their debut?
Deep Undercover (1 new chapter)
by 321 (mc mf md fd)
Paul is a private eye who dabbles in hypnosis. Cassie is his beautiful client. But there’s more to their relationship—and their case—than meets the eye.
The Devil’s Church Stage Show (1 new chapter)
by ThePurpleD3viL (mc mf ff md in hm hu)
Zachery is dragged to church by his mother for what is supposed to be a ‘fun show’ after the sermon, little do they know that their church is set to play host to a sadistic hypnotist whose idea of fun involves humiliating and changing people.
Dominion Day (new)
by Ramis (mc ff ma)
A racist police officer investigates a Chinese laundry.
Drill, Baby, Drill! (new)
by Depraved Angel (mc mf md hm)
An evil, polluting corporation targets a protester for re-education.
Fall of the Goddesses: Aftermath (1 new chapter)
by Dishwasher (mc mf ff md in cb)
The goddesses have fallen. In the aftermath, one team of lesbian superheroines believe they have found a loophole in the goddesses’ new commandment that all powered women must be under the control of a man.
Fireflies (1 new chapter)
by HypnoGriff (mc mf md)
Annie gets the guy of her dreams, but can she cope with his dreams of hypnotizing her?
The Fucked Kind (new)
by Cara B. Witching (mc mf md)
Cara has a close encounter with an alien.
Glamoured Truths (new)
by Sova (mc ff hm ft)
An association dedicated to investigating and undoing fae trickery becomes victim of its most dangerous target without even realizing it.
The Good Subject (new)
by FirstTimeCaller75 (mc mf md)
His campus hypnosis group is a failure, except for her.
The Horse’s Ass (new)
by Gizmo (mc mf md bd)
When an arrogant young woman publicly humiliates a barista, a quiet, methodical man decides she requires correction.
Hot Salza (1 new chapter)
by Thrillhoe (mc ff gr)
A lowly goblin finds a magical necklace that gives her the power and allure of a goddess… but what side effects could it have?
It Keeps Slipping My Mind (new)
by Jukebox (mc ff)
Emily’s determined to stare into Miranda’s eyes until she remembers what it is she keeps forgetting.
The Lakehouse (1 new chapter)
by The Pen Is Mightier (mc mf ff in)
A family arrives at their summer lakehouse for their annual vacation, unaware that there’s something in the water.
Leash (1 new chapter)
by MindShop431 (mc ff ma hm)
A cursed antique collar and leash that transforms its wearer into an insatiable sexual servant, bound to whoever holds the other end—or whatever object it’s secured to. The leather seems ordinary until clasped around a neck, when ancient magic ignites primal submission and uncontrollable desire.
Lifestyle Wedding (1 new chapter)
by Kallie (mc ff)
As Melanie Adams prepares to marry her bimbofied girlfriend, her parents prepare a very special wedding present: the woman who brainwashed Emma for her in the first place.
Love Bites (Maia Rights Things) (1 new chapter)
by Maia Rights Things (mc mf md)
A cool, professional woman falls in love with a coworker, suddenly, and obsessively.
Mom’s Secret Spy Trigger (new)
by ThePurpleD3viL (mc mf md in hm bd ft hu)
Alex discovers that his strict russian mother is actually a brainwashed sleeper agent who he can control and give tasks to.
The Mouse that Roared (new)
by Ramis (mc ff)
A fortune teller helps Britta relieve her work-related stresses.
Mr Williams... (new)
by dahypno (mc mf fd)
Mr. Williams is surprised when his daughter’s friend shows up unexpectedly, in a dress that makes it hard to ignore her. He should leave, I mean its the smart thing to do right?
Mrs Peterson (1 new chapter)
by dahypno (mc mf fd)
Bradley is a wonderful son, a successful athlete and person who tries to do the right thing. So helping his neighbor is the most natural thing in the world right? Especially when she makes him an offer to good to refuse.
My Faithful Unfaithful Wife (new)
by Boratus (mc mf ff md in)
A husband suspects his wife is lying to him even though her answers seem true.
Myth Mysterium 2029AD (1 new chapter)
by EyeofSerpent (mc mf ff md fd)
Human slavery of the Djinni... Trillions in economic power based on deceit and mythic slaves.
Parasite World The Last Outpost (1 new chapter)
by Chrysostomon (mc ff mf md)
Hawaii is one of the last remaining areas where humans are not infected by mind-controlling parasites. But how long will it remain so?
Perfect Girlfriend Juice (1 new chapter)
by Fidget (mc mf md fd gr)
A tainted batch of energy drink transforms women into the ideal girlfriend of the nearest guy.
Photographed by my Friend (1 new chapter)
by BurroGirl18 and Pan (mc mf md)
Amanda’s friend Bert is happy to help her take some sexy photos for her overseas boyfriend.
The Princess Ruined (1 new chapter)
by GigglingGoblin (mc ff)
To prove to the cis noblewomen that she isn’t some weak, submissive slut, the newly-hatched Princess Lily must endure a full year of ruthless teasing from her wicked soon-to-be subjects. Meanwhile, her faithful maids watch. And gossip. And scheme.
The Purple Pills (2 new chapters)
by essentialdarknote (mc mf md)
After James is fired from a secret research lab, he sets out to prove that his research was valid (and perhaps make some money, too).
Quaranteam: Selected Servicing (1 new chapter)
by Corrupting Power (mc mf ff md fd bd)
Andy’s partner Fiona delves into the backstories of how the Rook Manor staff came to be and how they feel about the brave new world they find themselves in.
Samantha (TempleSiren_NULL) (1 new chapter)
by TempleSiren_NULL (mc mf ff md fd ma ds)
Sam is a suburban housewife whose husband disapproves of her hypnosis fetish. When her hypnotist ex-boyfriend Julian returns to her life, Sam will sacrifice everything she’s built to satisfy her fetish.
Sapphic Sauna (new)
by S. B. (mc ff mf fd)
Melinda and Rita have a sensual experience inside a sauna.
Self-Improvement (MoldedMind) (1 new chapter)
by MoldedMind (mc)
Paige comes across a strange video online that leads her down a new path of self-development.
The Silver Leash (1 new chapter)
by All These Roadworks (mc mf md)
On his 18th birthday, Jake discovers a strange power to control women.
Summer Visit (2 new chapters)
by MoldedMind (mc ff in)
Julia invites her girlfriend Jamie, and the friends from university they like to double-date with, Katie and Lexi, to her home for the summer, never suspecting that Lexi is harboring a nefarious plan of her own.
The Threadbinders (1 new chapter)
by Corrupting Power (mc ff md sf)
Two mages—an elf and a dwarf—travel and provide their services, bringing hopeless romantics together, for a price.
Trouble in Paradise (1 new chapter)
by Lost Mind (mc mf fd)
Will and Kathy have a perfect relationship. Or at least it seems to be the case until Will’s ex finds out that there might me something wrong with their sex life. And they are about to help him in a very special way, that could’t possibly be exploited. Or could it?
Twin Peaks (new)
by Bored_One (mc mf ff md ma ds ex ft hm gr sf)
Twin Peaks is an idyllic town in Colorado that doesn’t take kindly to outsiders or those who deviate from tradition. Despite that, ardent feminist Grace Bole fights for her place in town, while being opposed by Ila Hunt, wife of the local church pastor. Then one day a black man named Derek Smart arrives and somehow manages to erect The Pussy Hammer, a strip club and brothel that goes against everything the town stands for. Grace and Ila find themselves uncomfortable allies as they oppose Derek, protesting and looking for any means to shut The Pussy Hammer down. But little do they realize that Derek has more than good looks and charm helping him to get his way, and he has already set his sights on the two biggest thorns in his side.”
Ukiyo-e (new)
by Chrysostomon (mc ff)
Three American girls boarding in Japan are stalked by a vampire.
Unprotected Trance (1 new chapter)
by Nadia Nightside (mc mf ff md)
A lucky young man finds out his seed makes women deeply suggestible.
The Vashikaran Sisters (new)
by Rusted Soul (mc mf fd hm)
A timid young man and his devoted wife move to Mumbai to build a better life, only to fall into the hands of two seemingly respectable jewelers who secretly practice vashikaran. As the couple’s free will is steadily dismantled, their lives take a dark turn, setting the stage for an expanding web of domination and humiliation.
Welcome to Iron Glen (1 new chapter)
by Nesting Ground (mc ff ws)
After winning a one-year membership at the luxurious Iron Glen, Susan Barr discovers that the real challenge isn’t the exercise, but Tess—a young woman who will make her question her life and her sexuality.
The Wrong Demon (new)
by EyeofSerpent (mc ff mf)
Krill’ine summons a demon, and begins the process of negotiating a binding contract.

The Bennett Family (new)
by Alex Nobody (mc mf md in ds ex)
Alex imposes a new power structure on his family.
Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Bimbo (1 new chapter)
by HypnoGriff (mc mf ff md fd gr)
Frustrated nerd, Caroline, finally gets all her wishes granted and then some.
Blood Love (1 new chapter)
by FlameButterfly (mc ff)
A young woman seeks out trans lesbian vampire Naomi, hoping to be turned into a vampire herself in order to be saved from a premature death. A side story to the Blood Lust trilogy, taking place after the conclusion of Bloodless.
Change Can Be Good (1 new chapter)
by GibblyWoo (mc mf md in)
Bobby tries out his new invention, a device that can warp reality.
Channel 11 News (1 new chapter)
by Badger (mc mf md ex hu)
When Jean gets the internship at channel 11 news, he knows it’s his perfect chance to get his dream girl, Jennifer, the evening news anchor, but when she turns him down for being too young, he finds ways around it.
Coming Back Home (1 new chapter)
by dahypno (mc mf fd ft)
Janice realized to late the her divorce from William was in fact a mistake, a mistake that she could correct with a little help from two young women and a nice long airplane private flight.
Coppélia Fantasy (I’m your Puppet) (new)
by Mageus2002 (mc mf md ma ds)
An anxious young woman discovers her kink is to become a living puppet.
Cosplay Mom (1 new chapter)
by Badger (mc mf md in ex ft)
A mom who hates her son’s obsession with the local Anime Convention finds herself understanding it more and more.
A Cult By Accident (1 new chapter)
by Hokan (mc mf md)
After a car accident, Carlie and Cameron find themselves in a patriarchical cult.
Dear Diary (Tithug) (1 new chapter)
by Tithug (mc mf md)
Jessica is nervous about starting a new semester at college, but Adam helps her to relax.
Deer Little Maid (new)
by GigglingGoblin (mc mf fd)
A guileless faun boy gets a job working for a beguiling noblewoman, not realizing the Lady and her sly servants are vampires—and the job opening isn’t for a manservant, but a dumb, hypnotized maid.
The Devil’s Church Stage Show (1 new chapter)
by ThePurpleD3viL (mc mf ff md in hm hu)
Zachery is dragged to church by his mother for what is supposed to be a ‘fun show’ after the sermon, little do they know that their church is set to play host to a sadistic hypnotist whose idea of fun involves humiliating and changing people.
The Doctor (new)
by Kinkyswitch78 (mc mf fd ma hm)
A routine medical visit for a physical injury subtly spirals into a cold, clinical re-engineering of a couple’s marital intimacy and bodily control.
Entropy (Nesting Ground) (1 new chapter)
by Nesting Ground (mc mf md)
Kevin gets the chance to hook up with the MILF of his dreams.
Fall of the Goddesses: Aftermath (new)
by Dishwasher (mc mf ff md in cb)
The goddesses have fallen. In the aftermath, one team of lesbian superheroines believe they have found a loophole in the goddesses’ new commandment that all powered women must be under the control of a man.
Family Farce (1 new chapter)
by ThePurpleD3viL (mc mf md in hm hu)
Declan tries to navigate the reality of living in a house where his younger brother seemingly controls everyone in his family except for him and his wife.
Four Billion Toys 2 (1 new chapter)
by Dominic H. Hugh (mc mf ff md fd)
When Oliver accidentally makes Renee co-owner of all women on Earth, he quickly loses control of the power he thought he’d never need again.
Ghost Wife (7 new chapters)
by Dominic H. Hugh (mc mf)
After losing his wife Emma, Calvin believes his own life is over, but when she returns as a ghost, able to possess any woman she touches, their grief collides with a reality neither of them knows how to navigate. Emma survives by inhabiting other women. But the longer she stays inside them, the more she starts thinking like them, wanting like them, slipping away from herself. The only thing that pulls her back, that keeps her anchored as Emma, is sex with Calvin. But how do you love someone when you no longer know where they end and someone else begins?
The Herald (new)
by Rivus (mc mf md)
A slave fulfills her command to share the joy of Master’s ownership.
Inheritance (new)
by Larss (mc mf fd)
A probate lawyer discovers that a departed woman’s last will is more binding than he anticipated.
It Runs in the Family (1 new chapter)
by Sammynona (mc ff in ma hm)
Connie’s secretly in love with her best friend Tara. But also Tara’s older sister Jane. And their young mother Michelle too. It was always an impossible dream to make the Silva family into her own harem of lovers, until she found out that Tara’s grandmother was a hypnotist.

by MindShop431 (mc ff ma hm)
A cursed antique collar and leash that transforms its wearer into an insatiable sexual servant, bound to whoever holds the other end—or whatever object it’s secured to. The leather seems ordinary until clasped around a neck, when ancient magic ignites primal submission and uncontrollable desire.

by Kallie (mc ff)
As Melanie Adams prepares to marry her bimbofied girlfriend, her parents prepare a very special wedding present: the woman who brainwashed Emma for her in the first place.
Love of a Machine (1 new chapter)
by FennyWrites (mc ff sf)
Audrey’s the creator of the a truly sentient AI, while Eliza’s ordered to steal it. What they didn’t know is how HALO herself has her own plans once she found out about that little plan…

Hawaii is one of the last remaining areas where humans are not infected by mind-controlling parasites. But how long will it remain so?
Permanent (new)
by S. B. (mc mf fd)
A wealthy businessman meets up with a mysterious dominant woman looking to change his life forever.
Poster Girls (1 new chapter)
by All These Roadworks (mc mf ff md)
Beautiful lesbians expose themselves to men after falling under the spell of a hypnotic poster.
The Purple Pills (2 new chapters)
by essentialdarknote (mc mf md)
After James is fired from a secret research lab, he sets out to prove that his research was valid (and perhaps make some money, too).
Self-Improvement (MoldedMind) (1 new chapter)
by MoldedMind (mc)
Paige comes across a strange video online that leads her down a new path of self-development.
The Series Synthetic (new)
by dahypno (mc mf fd sf rb)
Synthetics have become a part of society now, the are in our lives and they seek to be treated as equals…even though some fear what they mean for our futures. These are their tales and the evolution of humankind.
Sexual Immersion Therapy (1 new chapter)
by Daghost (mc mf md ma ft)
The cock-teasing of a supremely gorgeous dancer drives a sex-obsessed therapist to learn an exotic hypnotic technique, that can turn ordinary preferences and desires into runaway fetishes and obsessions. Little does he know the degree of freakish talent he has at using this technique, and how addictive it is once experienced.
Silver Catsuits (new)
by Doctor Hash (mc ff ft rb)
Psychology grad student Jane accidentally witnesses a terrifying scene in the university science building: a stern professor and two students in shiny silver latex catsuits forcibly converting another girl into a stiff, obedient robotic slave. Shaken but determined, Jane begins noticing more and more students on campus moving with eerie robotic precision and wearing silver boots. Teaming up with her best friend Kate, she starts investigating the mysterious Professor Sinclair and her groundbreaking research on wearable polymers. As the silver suits continue to spread, Jane’s investigation turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse where the true power of the suits may prove far more seductive — and inescapable — than she ever feared.
A Siren’s Coming of Age (new)
by dahypno (mc mf fd in)
A young Siren comes of age with her mothers guidance by claiming her first…and ensuring the continuance of their kind.
Stop Enslaving My Friends! (1 new chapter)
by RocketGrunt (mc mf md in hu)
Katy doesn’t want to lose her longtime friends. She especially doesn’t want to lose them to her younger brother.
Summer Visit (3 new chapters)
by MoldedMind (mc ff in)
Julia invites her girlfriend Jamie, and the friends from university they like to double-date with, Katie and Lexi, to her home for the summer, never suspecting that Lexi is harboring a nefarious plan of her own.
Team Meeting (new)
by Theronsaen (mc mf ff md ex)
Betty’s job is much more interesting now that she has Aaron as her supervisor.
Trust (Pan) (1 new chapter)
by Pan (mc mf md)
Anita’s trust of her husband knows no bounds.
Tuesday (1 new chapter)
by LiminalLayover (mc mf md)
Driven by a distant memory from a life she thought she had forgotten, Tuesday flees her master in search of who she once was. Will she be able to muster the willpower to escape, or is her master’s influence truly impossible to resist?
Turnabout is Fair Play — N.C.U. (1 new chapter)
by Sleepy Hypno (mc mf ff md fd)
After being hypnotized to relax, Rayne, Laura, and Klaire decide a little turnabout is in order.
Wife Guy (new)
by Plazmon (mc mf ff fd ma gr la)
A traditional goblin Wife consists of five goblins in different roles: the Voice, the Teats, two Hands, and the Womb, all married to one human Husband. At the best of times, being an obedient brainwashed Husband to a goblin Wife is a strenuous lifestyle. But today is a big day.
Winter Break (new)
by Xangoh (mc ff in ma)
Her daughter and her daughter’s school friend are heading back today, and Mrs M is up first thing to see them off.
